LightningComponentBundle.description: Used in flow in the public register to allow search for PRS Exemptions and Penalties

property.name: allowOtherSearch
property.label: Indicates if other searches, beyond postcode, are allowed

property.name: displayResultsAtPropertyLevel
property.label: If ticked one result will be shown per property, if unticked a result will be shown for each exemption per property

property.name: allowOtherSearch
property.label: Indicates if other searches, beyond postcode, are allowed

property.name: displayResultsAtPropertyLevel
property.label: If ticked one result will be shown per property, if unticked a result will be shown for each exemption per property
